mechanism_narrative: Positive industrial production momentum signals improving real activity and operating leverage for index constituents; higher 3-month INDPRO growth predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Latest INDPRO value is 102.6475 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO growth is followed by non-positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of walk-forward observations, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate above a late-cycle threshold signals deteriorating household income and earnings risk; when UNRATE exceeds 4.0% and rises over 3 months, S&P 500 20-day returns are negative.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE > 4.0% and UNRATE rises > 0.2pp over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:Latest UNRATE value is 4.3 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward cases or if average triggered returns exceed unconditional average returns.

mechanism_narrative: Restrictive policy combined with persistent inflation keeps discount rates elevated and compresses equity multiples; when FEDFUNDS is above 3.5% and CPIAUCSL inflation momentum is positive, 20-day returns are negative.
evidence_refs: fact:Latest FEDFUNDS value is 3.63 and latest CPIAUCSL value is 333.979
regime_hint: restrictive monetary policy with persistent inflation
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger has positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the interaction term FEDFUNDS x CPIAUCSL has non-negative predictive coefficient in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts lead cyclical construction, durable-goods demand, and bank-credit conditions; when HOUST falls below its 6-month average, S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days are negative.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 6-month moving average
evidence_refs: fact:Latest HOUST value is 1465.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside crossovers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered cases or if triggered mean returns are not below unconditional mean returns.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real activity and retail spending signal resilient nominal revenue growth; when RSAFS and GDPC1 both increase versus their prior available observations, S&P 500 60-day returns are positive.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS latest value > prior available value and GDPC1 latest value > prior available value
evidence_refs: fact:Latest RSAFS value is 757085.0 and latest GDPC1 value is 24152.656
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive-growth trigger has lower 60-day average S&P 500 returns than unconditional returns or if either proxy's positive-growth coefficient is statistically indistinguishable from zero in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll expansion without a simultaneous unemployment decline signals late-cycle wage pressure rather than productivity-led growth; when PAYEMS rises and UNRATE does not fall, 5-day S&P 500 returns are negative.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises over 1 month and UNRATE is flat or higher over 1 month
evidence_refs: fact:Latest PAYEMS value is 159001 and latest UNRATE value is 4.3
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 58% of cases or if the PAYEMS-UNRATE interaction coefficient is non-negative in walk-forward classification tests.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the federal funds rate lowers short-rate discounting and supports equity duration; when FEDFUNDS falls by at least 25 basis points over 3 months, S&P 500 20-day returns are positive.
evidence_refs: fact:Latest FEDFUNDS value is 3.63 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if 3-month FEDFUNDS declines of at least 25 basis points are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in less than 50% of cases or if triggered mean returns are below unconditional mean returns.

mechanism_narrative: Very strong retail sales growth after restrictive policy signals demand resilience and near-term earnings upgrades; when RSAFS grows over 3 months while FEDFUNDS stays above 3.5%, 5-day returns are positive.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS rises over 3 months and FEDFUNDS > 3.5%
evidence_refs: fact:Latest RSAFS value is 757085.0 and latest FEDFUNDS value is 3.63
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger produces non-positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if the RSAFS x FEDFUNDS interaction has negative predictive contribution in walk-forward tests.
